stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Which of the following aerofoils would be most suitable for a supersonic speed?

options.a: Aerofoil 1, which will minimize the affects of shock stall and have the best performance at supersonic speeds.
options.b: Aerofoil 2, which will perform well across a wider range of speeds (both sub and supersonic).
options.c: Aerofoil 3, with the higher radius will increase the MCRIT.
options.d: None of the options are ideal aerofoils for supersonic speeds.
